Solution

Identify, Assess, and Mitigate Arc Flash Hazards

At Care Labs, we encourage our clients to adopt proactive safety measures like arc flash studies for Singapore industries. Our solutions help companies address key concerns like electrical safety, reliability, and compliance with standards like OSHA, NFPA 70E, IEEE 1584, and Singapore standards like SS 651:2019.

Support

360° Arc Flash Protection

At Care Labs, our team validates extensive protection and safety from electrical hazards with integrated support and effective solutions. We specialize in offering continual support to our clients in Singapore.

Technical  Support:

Our technical support includes arc flash risk analysis, using ETAP to generate arc flash labels, and marking arc flash boundaries

Safety And Compliance Support:
We are equipped with the skills and expertise to guide the appropriate arc flash PPE, and generate arc flash study reports in compliance with IEEE 1584 and Singapore standards.

Technology

ETAP Arc Flash Study- A Valuable Tool

Don’t leave arc flash hazards to chance. At Care Labs, our team expertise combined with ETAP technology helps your business in Singapore reach its full potential safely. Partner with Care Labs today and leverage the power of ETAP for comprehensive arc flash risk assessment.

Contact Us
System

High-Risk Arc Flash Hazard Equipment

We analyze multiple electrical system devices to pinpoint the areas of high risk for arc flash incidents.

  • Power Distribution System- switchboards, MCCs, transformers
  • Protective Devices and Relays- Circuit Breakers, Protective relays, Fuses
  • High-risk electrical equipment- Busbars, Capacitor banks, Harmonic filters
﻿Industries

Industries We Serve

FAQs

Arc Flash Study in Singapore- Q & A

    What is arc flash analysis and why is it important in Singapore ?
Arc flash analysis is a power system analysis method used to determine potential areas of high risk for arc flash incidents in an electrical system. It is a part of the preventive measures strategy that helps companies ensure electrical safety and compliance in Singapore.
    Who needs an arc flash study in Singapore ?
Any facility with an electrical system is at risk of electrical hazards like arc flashes. An arc flash study helps identify and mitigate the risks, thereby earning compliance with standards like IEEE 1584, NFPA 70E, and Singapore Safety regulations like the WSH Act.
    What factors influence arc flash incident energy ?
System voltage levels, fault current levels, and clearing time of protective devices are some of the common factors that influence incident energy levels. An arc flash analysis helps the industry identify these vulnerabilities and implement the necessary recommendations. Contact Care Labs to know more.
    What are the requirements of arc flash compliance in Singapore ?

Some of the requirements for compliance in Singapore are:

  • Employers need to assess electrical risks regularly and provide the right PPE and training to the workforce.
  • Electrical equipment and devices must have arc flash hazard labels.
  • The arc flash risk assessments must comply with the standard WSH guidelines.
    How are arc flash boundaries determined ?
Arc flash boundaries are determined based on the incident energy levels and distance at which PPE will protect the workers.

Technology

Smarter Solutions With ETAP Power Flow Analysis

With the leading software ETAP, Care Labs performs load flow analysis that reveals every detail from power losses in the system to the voltage profile of critical equipment.  Implement the latest safety measures to optimize load flow in the system with Care Labs’ power flow analysis, tailored for Singapore industries.
Contact Us
System

High-Risk Load Flow Analysis Equipment

Care Labs’ load flow analysis in Singapore evaluates power distribution and system stability at various nodes in the system.
  • Power Distribution System- switchboards, MCCs, transformers
  • Power Flow & Load Balancing Equipment-Generators & Prime Movers, Transmission & Distribution Feeders, Capacitor Banks & Power Factor Correction Equipment
  • High-risk electrical equipment- Busbars, Industrial Heaters, Compressors, & Heavy Machinery.
Industries

Industries We Serve

FAQs

Load Flow Analysis in Singapore- Q & A

    Who needs to conduct load flow analysis ?
Any facility with an electrical system needs power flow analysis to get insights into energy losses in the system and load distribution. From manufacturing facilities to critical industries like data centers, hospitals, airports, etc need load flow analysis in Singapore to stay safe and compliant.
    What are the key parameters analyzed in Load Flow Analysis ?

The key parameters analyzed are:

  • Voltage magnitudes and phase angles at all buses.
  • Active (MW) and reactive (MVAR) power flows in transmission lines.
  • Power factor and system losses.
  • Transformer loading and generator output optimization.
    What software is used for Load Flow Analysis ?
At Care Labs, we use ETAP as our primary software to conduct load flow analysis for Singapore industries. With his technology, we can conduct in-depth load flow analysis and generate insightful reports to make informed decisions.
    My manufacturing facility in Singapore is experiencing frequent voltage fluctuations. What studies do you recommend ?
Frequent voltage fluctuations are a serious concern and if not rectified on time can lead to costly downtimes and even electrical hazards. We would recommend load flow analysis, and harmonic analysis followed by short circuit and relay coordination studies to completely understand and pinpoint the reasons behind these voltage fluctuations. For more details, contact our team.
    Can a company perform load flow analysis in Singapore internally ?
If you have qualified engineers who have expertise using technology like ETAP, you can perform load flow analysis internally. However, it is always advisable to contact third-party consulting like Care Labs to perform comprehensive studies by expert electrical engineers with experience using ETAP.

Support

With protective devices working in coordination, system reliability and reduced downtime are guaranteed. To facilitate this, Care Labs offers superior support in relay coordination study for Singapore facilities.
Technical  Support:
Time Current Coordination analysis for relay coordination study using ETAP, Care Labs offers premium solutions for relay coordination study in Singapore.
Safety And Compliance Support:

Learn more

Technology

At Care Labs, we know the significance of protective device coordination in ensuring seamless operation. Our software suite includes ETAP, which helps collect data, analyze, simulate, and generate reports that comply with Singapore standards for electrical safety. Shake hands with us to make your facility’s power system spick and span.

Contact Us
System

High-Risk Relay Coordination Study Equipment

For proper protection and fault isolation, we analyze critical electrical equipment in your power system.

  • Power Distribution System- switchboards, MCCs, transformers
  • Protective Devices & Relay Systems- Overcurrent relays, ground fault relays, and differential relays.
  • High-risk electrical equipment- Busbars, Softstarters, capacitor banks.
Industries

Industries We Serve

FAQs

Relay Coordination Study in Singapore- Q & A

    What is a relay coordination study ?

It is an electrical engineering analysis technique to evaluate the operating conditions of protective devices like relays. These devices must work in a logical sequence to prevent any cascading faults and improve system stability and reliability. Care Labs offers insightful relay coordination studies tailored to industry standards in Singapore.

    How often should a Relay Coordination Study be conducted in Singapore ?

The Singapore standards like SS 638 & IEC 60255, and best practices necessitate a relay coordination study every five years for facilities here. In addition to this, major electrical altercations, electrical faults, and a short circuit analysis also need a relay coordination study.

    Is short circuit analysis a prerequisite for relay coordination study ?

Yes, the relay coordination study requires data from fault analysis to implement recommendations for best protective device settings.

    What are the key deliverables of a relay coordination study for Singapore industries ?

At Care Labs, our relay coordination study reports are comprehensive and compliant with electrical safety codes. The following are the main deliverables:

  • TCC or Time-Current coordination Curves for protective devices
  • Short circuit analysis report
  • Updated Single-Line-Diagram( SLD) of the electrical system
  • Recommendation for realy settings and upgrades.
    What is the cost of a relay coordination study in Singapore ?

The cost of a protective device study in Singapore depends on the complexity of the electrical system, facility size, and number of relays. Care Offers cost-effective solutions for protective device coordination in compliance with Singapore’s electrical safety standards (SS 638, IEC, IEEE).

title: Short Circuit Analysis For Methodical Power System Planning and Operation
metaDescription: Care Labs’ short circuit analysis in Singapore. Prevent failures, improve reliability & ensure compliance with IEC 60909 & SS 638

Support

Fortified Protection From Fault Currents

Short circuit analysis for Singapore industries entails evaluation of the system for safe, reliable, and compliant operation. Our solutions are made to help businesses protect their facility and their workers.
Technical Support:
Care Labs’ fault analysis analyzes the system’s behavior for various fault conditions. Advanced technology like ETAP helps us deliver impeccable results.
Safety And Compliance Support:
Proactive safety with compliance with local and international codes for electrical safety like IEEE, OSHA, and NFPA 70E are Care Labs’ fortes in power system analysis.

ETAP- The Smart Choice For Fault Analysis

The key advantage- the results are impeccable for system improvements and emergency planning. Perfect your power systems in Singapore with value-enhancing and insightful short circuit analysis solutions from Care Labs.

System

High-Risk Short Circuit Analysis Equipment

For accurate fault levels and prevention of catastrophic failure, we offer a comprehensive analysis of the power system, point to point.
  • Power Distribution System- switchboards, MCCs, transformers
  • Protective Devices & Relay Systems- Overcurrent relays, ground fault relays, and differential relays.
  • High-risk electrical equipment- Busbars, Transformers & Generator Windings, Cable & Conductor Ratings
Industries

Industries We Serve

FAQs

Short Circuit Analysis in Singapore- Q & A

    What is the importance of short circuit analysis for Singapore facilities ?
From the prevention of protective devices failing to ensure compliance with SS 638 (Code of Practice for Electrical Installations) and IEC 60909 (Short Circuit Current Calculation), fault analysis is a critical step in electrical system assessment and hazard analysis.
    How often do we need a fault analysis in Singapore ?
A short circuit analysis is essential every five years or when there are drastic changes or expansions in the facility’s electrical system. An electrical hazard or major outage also makes this study imperative for maintaining electrical safety and compliance in a facility in Singapore.
    How can I estimate the cost of a short circuit study for my facility ?
The price of a short circuit study depends on the complexity of the network system and other related factors. For more information on this and to get a free quote, contact Care Labs.
    What are the key deliverables for Care Labs’ short circuit analysis in Singapore ?

Care Labs’ short circuit analysis for Singapore industries yields:

  • Fault current levels calculations
  • Relay and protective device coordination
  • Short circuit current ratings for equipment
  • Recommendations for upgrades.
    What happens if a protective device is underrated for short circuits ?
Excessive thermal and mechanical stress during short circuits can melt or explode these protective devices leading to catastrophic effects. Further, those may fail to trip and result in cascading faults and disruptions to the operation of the system and the facility.

Making Power Systems Safe To Manage

Care Labs simplifies electrical energy management systems for seamless operation. We make your power system comprehensible, reliable, and easy to control.
